{{CargoRelic
|name=Prototype Resolver
|class_id=20833
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=A marvelous machine discovered in the Microcosm, seemingly a prototype for a resolver. Due to design flaws, it doesn't have the functionality to convert other substances into cultivation fluid and serum. Instead, it serves well as a bedside or corner decoration, functioning as a night light.
|fame=15
|art=15
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=32
|ss1=Resolver: Cultivation Fluid extracted +1<br>Per 1 Incubator File fully restored, Snail ATK +2<br>Files fully restored: 20/20
|ss2=Resolver: Cultivation Fluid extracted +1<br>Per 1 Incubator File fully restored, Snail ATK +4<br>Files fully restored: 20/20
|ss3=Resolver: Cultivation Fluid extracted +1<br>Per 1 Incubator File fully restored, Snail ATK +6<br>Files fully restored: 20/20
|ss4=Resolver: Cultivation Fluid extracted +1<br>Per 1 Incubator File fully restored, Snail ATK +6<br>Files fully restored: 20/20
|ss7=Resolver: Cultivation Fluid extracted +1<br>Per 1 Incubator File fully restored, Snail ATK +6<br>Files fully restored: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
